name: industrial-brutalist-ui
tagline: CSS/UI design-system guide for brutalist, Swiss-industrial or tactical-terminal interfaces on dashboards and editorial sites.
verdict: Safe, concrete design-system reference: specific hex colors, type scale, spacing, and layout rules, no commands or network calls at all. Weak spots: no criteria for choosing between its two visual archetypes, no negative-trigger guidance, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance anywhere in the skill.
Line 13: 'Pick ONE per project and commit to it' but no criteria given for choosing Swiss vs Tactical archetype.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
